plain.en: O God, our Father, who desire all peoples of the world to recognise Jesus as the one you sent to save us; look with kindness o us, as we celebrate the memorial of Saint Marcellinus, and fill us with the same missionary zeal and spirit. Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son, who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit, one God, for ever and ever.

en.text: who desire all peoples of the world
to recognise Jesus as the one you sent to save us;
as we celebrate the memorial of Saint Marcellinus,
and fill us with the same missionary zeal and spirit.
Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son,
who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit,
one God, for ever and ever.
